sections.paragraph: m., Job 40:21, 22 Job 40:22rendered by Abulwalid, Schultens, and others, the wild lotuses. But others regard צֶאֱלִים as being used, in the Aramœan manner, for צֶלְלִים shades, i.e. shady trees; like מָכַךְ, Aram. מְאַךְ, מָסַס Aram. מְאַס; compare Hebr. מָאַס No. II. So Vulg., Syr., Aben Ezra.
